title: canarium galokense
intro: Canarium galokense, also known as the Galok nut tree, is a plant species native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Canarium galokense include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Canarium galokense is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
